hero.css: .hero_001 { position: relative; isolation: isolate; min-height: 100svh; overflow: hidden; display: flex; align-items: stretch; color: #fff7ed; background: radial-gradient(circle at 78% 16%, rgba(255, 205, 116, 0.28) 0 12%, transparent 29%), radial-gradient(circle at 12% 82%, rgba(236, 72, 153, 0.18) 0 14%, transparent 32%), linear-gradient(135deg, #190711 0%, #4b1027 38%, #7c2d12 72%, #1a0b10 100%); font-family: Manrope, sans-serif; } .hero_001::before { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: -2; background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(255,255,255,0.045) 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.035) 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 72px 72px; mask-image: radial-gradient(circle at 62% 42%, #000 0 42%, transparent 78%); } .hero_001::after { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: auto -12% -42% -12%; height: 58%; z-index: -1; background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, rgba(255, 168, 63, 0.32), transparent 62%); filter: blur(18px); } .hero_001 .hero_001__wrap { width: min(1180px, calc(100% - 48px)); margin: 0 auto; min-height: 100svh; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.02fr 0.98fr; align-items: center; gap: 42px; padding: 72px 0 56px; position: relative; } .hero_001 .hero_001__toran { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); width: min(820px, 86vw); height: 86px; pointer-events: none; opacity: 0.9; } .hero_001 .hero_001__toran-line { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(255, 214, 147, 0.9), transparent); } .hero_001 .hero_001__drop { position: absolute; top: 0; width: 18px; height: 58px; transform: translateX(-50%); background: linear-gradient(#f8b04c, #db2777); clip-path: polygon(50% 100%, 0 38%, 18% 0, 82% 0, 100% 38%); box-shadow: 0 10px 28px rgba(255, 179, 71, 0.22); } .hero_001 .hero_001__drop:nth-child(2) { left: 9%; height: 45px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__drop:nth-child(3) { left: 22%; } .hero_001 .hero_001__drop:nth-child(4) { left: 36%; height: 50px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__drop:nth-child(5) { left: 50%; height: 64px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__drop:nth-child(6) { left: 64%; height: 50px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__drop:nth-child(7) { left: 78%; } .hero_001 .hero_001__drop:nth-child(8) { left: 91%; height: 45px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__content { position: relative; z-index: 2; padding-top: 28px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__eyebrow { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 9px 14px; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 215, 160, 0.34); border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(255, 247, 237, 0.08); backdrop-filter: blur(14px); box-shadow: 0 16px 52px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.18); color: #ffe7c7; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.16em; text-transform: uppercase; } .hero_001 .hero_001__eyebrow-mark { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 999px; background: #fbbf24; box-shadow: 0 0 0 6px rgba(251, 191, 36, 0.14); } .hero_001 .hero_001__title { margin: 28px 0 12px; font-family: "Playfair Display", "Cormorant Garamond", serif; font-size: clamp(72px, 9.2vw, 146px); line-height: 0.83; letter-spacing: -0.075em; font-weight: 700; color: #fffaf0; text-wrap: balance; } .hero_001 .hero_001__amp { display: inline-block; margin: 0 0.04em; color: #ffc767; font-family: "Cormorant Garamond", serif; font-weight: 500; font-style: italic; text-shadow: 0 0 34px rgba(255, 199, 103, 0.38); } .hero_001 .hero_001__subtitle { max-width: 620px; margin: 26px 0 0; color: rgba(255, 247, 237, 0.82); font-size: clamp(16px, 1.5vw, 20px); line-height: 1.75; } .hero_001 .hero_001__meta { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 12px; margin: 34px 0 0; } .hero_001 .hero_001__pill { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 13px 16px; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 234, 197, 0.24); background: rgba(40, 8, 19, 0.42); color: #fff2da; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.08); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; } .hero_001 .hero_001__pill-icon { color: #ffd08a; font-size: 15px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__actions { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; gap: 14px; margin-top: 38px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__button { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 52px; padding: 0 24px; border-radius: 999px; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0.02em; color: #2a0714; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fff0c8, #f59e0b 52%, #fb7185); box-shadow: 0 22px 60px rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.28); } .hero_001 .hero_001__link { color: #ffe8c7; text-decoration: none; font-weight: 800; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 232, 199, 0.42); padding-bottom: 4px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__art { position: relative; min-height: 620px; display: grid; place-items: center; } .hero_001 .hero_001__halo { position: absolute; width: min(560px, 45vw); aspect-ratio: 1; border-radius: 50%; background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255, 248, 220, 0.18) 0 16%, transparent 17% 100%), conic-gradient(from 18deg, rgba(255, 211, 128, 0.95), rgba(244, 114, 182, 0.52), rgba(251, 191, 36, 0.78), rgba(255, 211, 128, 0.95)); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(255, 225, 172, 0.24), 0 30px 120px rgba(255, 165, 57, 0.22); opacity: 0.82; } .hero_001 .hero_001__halo::before { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 18px; border-radius: 50%; background: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, transparent 0 52%, rgba(26, 7, 16, 0.88) 53% 64%, transparent 65%), repeating-conic-gradient(from 0deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.42) 0 2deg, transparent 2deg 8deg); mask-image: radial-gradient(circle, transparent 0 48%, #000 49% 100%); } .hero_001 .hero_001__halo::after { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 72px; border-radius: 50%; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 234, 197, 0.3); background: radial-gradient(circle at 42% 34%, rgba(255,255,255,0.2), transparent 26%), linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.12), rgba(255,255,255,0.03)); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); } .hero_001 .hero_001__blessing { position: relative; width: min(390px, 35vw); min-height: 430px; border-radius: 46% 46% 38% 38%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 42px; text-align: center; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 235, 204, 0.26); background: linear-gradient(160deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.16), rgba(255,255,255,0.05)); box-shadow: 0 34px 90px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.28), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.22); backdrop-filter: blur(18px); } .hero_001 .hero_001__ganesh { margin: 0 0 18px; font-family: "Noto Serif Gujarati", "Rozha One", serif; font-size: clamp(42px, 5vw, 78px); line-height: 1; color: #ffe5ac; text-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(255, 206, 126, 0.36); } .hero_001 .hero_001__blessing-title { margin: 0; font-family: "Playfair Display", serif; font-size: clamp(28px, 3vw, 45px); line-height: 1.04; color: #fffaf0; } .hero_001 .hero_001__blessing-copy { margin: 18px 0 0; color: rgba(255, 247, 237, 0.76); font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.7; } .hero_001 .hero_001__date { position: absolute; right: 2%; bottom: 8%; width: 172px; height: 172px; border-radius: 50%; display: grid; place-items: center; text-align: center; color: #2d0714; background: radial-gradient(circle at 34% 24%, #fff8dc, #ffd36e 58%, #f97316); box-shadow: 0 28px 70px rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.3); } .hero_001 .hero_001__date strong { display: block; font-family: "Playfair Display", serif; font-size: 48px; line-height: 0.9; } .hero_001 .hero_001__date span { display: block; margin-top: 6px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 900; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; } .hero_001 .hero_001__spark { position: absolute; border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(255, 230, 181, 0.78); box-shadow: 0 0 28px rgba(255, 210, 134, 0.72); } .hero_001 .hero_001__spark:nth-of-type(4) { width: 10px; height: 10px; top: 16%; left: 10%; } .hero_001 .hero_001__spark:nth-of-type(5) { width: 7px; height: 7px; top: 22%; right: 10%; } .hero_001 .hero_001__spark:nth-of-type(6) { width: 12px; height: 12px; bottom: 20%; left: 7%; } .hero_001 .hero_001__events { position: absolute; left: 50%; bottom: 36px; transform: translateX(-50%); display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center; gap: 10px; width: min(980px, calc(100% - 48px)); z-index: 3; } .hero_001 .hero_001__event { padding: 9px 13px; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 225, 180, 0.22); border-radius: 999px; color: rgba(255, 247, 237, 0.8); background: rgba(24, 7, 15, 0.34); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); font-size: 12px; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; } @media (max-width: 900px) { .hero_001 { min-height: auto; } .hero_001 .hero_001__wrap { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 12px; width: min(720px, calc(100% - 36px)); padding: 104px 0 138px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__content { text-align: center; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; } .hero_001 .hero_001__subtitle { max-width: 650px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__meta { justify-content: center; } .hero_001 .hero_001__actions { justify-content: center; } .hero_001 .hero_001__art { min-height: 520px; order: -1; } .hero_001 .hero_001__halo { width: min(520px, 74vw); } .hero_001 .hero_001__blessing { width: min(360px, 58vw); min-height: 390px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__date { right: 12%; bottom: 3%; width: 142px; height: 142px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__events { bottom: 28px; } } @media (max-width: 640px) { .hero_001 .hero_001__wrap { width: min(100% - 28px, 520px); padding: 86px 0 158px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__toran { width: 96vw; height: 70px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__drop { width: 14px; height: 46px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__eyebrow { font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.1em; padding: 8px 11px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__title { font-size: clamp(58px, 21vw, 92px); margin-top: 22px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__subtitle { font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.65; } .hero_001 .hero_001__pill { width: 100%; justify-content: center; font-size: 13px; padding: 12px 14px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__actions { width: 100%; } .hero_001 .hero_001__button { width: 100%; } .hero_001 .hero_001__art { min-height: 430px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__halo { width: 92vw; opacity: 0.68; } .hero_001 .hero_001__blessing { width: min(310px, 80vw); min-height: 340px; padding: 32px 28px; border-radius: 42% 42% 34% 34%; } .hero_001 .hero_001__ganesh { font-size: 48px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__blessing-copy { font-size: 13px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__date { width: 112px; height: 112px; right: 0; bottom: 0; } .hero_001 .hero_001__date strong { font-size: 36px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__date span { font-size: 9px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__events { width: calc(100% - 24px); gap: 7px; bottom: 18px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__event { font-size: 10px; padding: 8px 10px; } }
hero.designNotes: A modern luxury Gujarati wedding hero without photography: deep jewel-toned gradients, glassmorphism, mandala-inspired geometry, a subtle toran, and a refined Shri Ganesh blessing create a festive first-screen experience while keeping the typography editorial and Western-modern.
hero.html:
With blessings of Shri Ganesh

Kavya &
Mihir

Together with our families, we invite you to celebrate a joyful Gujarati wedding filled with mehendi, garba, baraat, sacred pheras, dinner, music, and love.

✦March 22, 2026
⌖Akshar Grand Palace
◌Somerset, New Jersey
RSVP to the CelebrationView wedding events
ૐ

A weekend of joy, rhythm, and sacred vows

શ્રી ગણેશાય નમઃ
Modern celebration, timeless blessings.

22March 2026
MehendiGarbaBaraatPherasDinnerMusic
